arts.ttl: Celtic starting XI against Dundee United - cup final spotlight star starts
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers has named his starting line-up to face Dundee United at Tannadice

arts.ttl: Sky Sports make Celtic fixture announcement
arts.sum: Celtic have had games against the likes of St Johnstone and Hearts moved to silly 5:45pm and 7:45pm kick-off times on a Saturday evening this season and now, Sky Sports have made another announcement regarding the coverage of another of the Parkhead clubs’ fixtures in February of next year. The broadcasting giant announced that they will now be covering Celtic’s trip to Fir Park in February as part of their live TV coverage of the Scottish Premiership .

arts.ttl: Celtic move hot topic warning to top of official matchday advice for Dundee Utd
arts.sum: Celtic have issued their official matchday advice for today's trip to Dundee United with a warning topping the list

arts.ttl: Dundee United vs Celtic LIVE as Yang, Welsh and McCowan handed starts for champions
arts.sum: The champions are back in league action after their Premier Sports Cup win at Hampden and face a tricky trip to Tannadice

arts.ttl: Presenter asked about Kasper Schmeichel's Celtic behaviour v Rangers after Willie Collum talks
arts.sum: “Did Wille Collum say anything about Schmeichel’s behaviour in the penalty shootout when you talked with him in the VAR Review,” asked a Rangers fan. Schmeichel’s penalty save allowed Daizen Maeda to finish off the job and produce the trophy-winning moment in what was an eventual and drama-filled Glasgow derby encounter.

arts.ttl: Celtic squad revealed as Luke McCowan tipped for start as Brendan Rodgers rotates after Rangers rollercoaster
arts.sum: Dundee Utd away kicks of a hectic Hoops festive schedule after going the distance at Hampden last weekend

arts.ttl: Peter Martin tells Neil Lennon of 'replay' talks for Celtic v Rangers League Cup final
arts.sum: Peter Martin tells Neil Lennon about ‘replay’ talks for Celtic v Rangers League Cup final Neil Lennon says Celtic-Rangers penalty drama has ‘rumbled on too long’

arts.ttl: Dundee United boss Jim Goodwin shares what 'everybody is trying to figure out' about 'obscene' Celtic
arts.sum: With Hoops boss Brendan Rodgers facing Dundee United for the first time ever today, Goodwin admits he needs to be careful his team don’t get ‘punished’ live on Sky Sports when asked how he plans to end the Parkhead club’s unbeaten run. Hoping to jump into fourth place with a win against Celtic, Goodwin admits that he knows he has a ‘big task’ ahead to try and win all three points today at Tannadice.

arts.ttl: Kris Boyd says Celtic will win the league after Rangers beat Dundee
arts.sum: Kris Boyd says Celtic ‘by far’ the best team in Scotland after Rangers beat Dundee A lot has been said about Celtic’s penalty shootout win over Rangers in the League Cup final and those penalty cries.

arts.ttl: 'That's the reality'... Bobby Petta's Celtic warning to Rangers ahead of Dundee United game
arts.sum: With the Hoops unbeaten in the league, former Celtic winger Bobby Petta has a message for Rangers ahead of that game but first, he delivers his prediction for today’s Tannadice lunchtime kickoff. As the controversy of Celtic winning the League Cup has dominated the headlines this week, the build-up to the Bhoys’ game against Dundee United has been relatively low-key.
